description_long: This is a modern, rectangular barbecue grill with a robust, metallic construction and a sleek, dark finish. The front features four prominent control knobs, likely for adjusting individual burners, and a pair of cabinet doors below for storage. The lid is large and angular, equipped with a built-in thermometer at the center, and sturdy handles on each side for lifting. Both sides of the grill have boxy protrusions, possibly for mounting side shelves or accessories, though no shelves are currently attached. The overall design is clean and functional, with subtle venting details and a solid base. The grill is suitable for outdoor use in urban parks, patios, or backyards, offering ample cooking space and storage.
description: A sleek, dark-finished barbecue grill with four control knobs, a large lid with a thermometer, and a double-door storage cabinet below. The design is modern and robust, ideal for outdoor cooking.
description_view_0: Front view showing four control knobs, double-door storage, and the main lid with a central thermometer.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the handle and boxy side mount, with no side shelf attached.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back panel with minimal detailing.
description_view_3: Left side view similar to the right, showing the handle and side mount without a shelf.
